ques: Find a compact digital camera on Amazon with a zoom capability of at least 10x, rated 4 stars or higher, and priced between $100 to $300.
answer: Panasonic Lumix DMC-ZS25K 16.1 MP Compact Digital Camera with 40x Intelligent Zoom (Black) — 20x optical / 40x intelligent zoom, 4.3 stars, EUR184.98 (within $100–$300).
